chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Next thing we are going to read in HTML is the boilerplate code of HTML

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: In HTML or any other programming language, boilerplate code means the code which we are going to write before writing HTML code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That means if we have to make any file in which we will write any HTML code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So before that, there is a part in HTML which we have to write first

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Every language has its own boilerplate code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you want to write Java, then Java has a boilerplate code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you want to write C++, then C++ also has a boilerplate code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So it is a basic template which we have to write always

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So this basic template or standard format we can call it or we can call it as skeleton of writing HTML code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That means there is a basic structure of our HTML code which we have to prepare first

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That means we have to open the file and write simple tags like we have written till now

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We don't have to write tags like we have written paragraph tag in the first line or any other tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We don't have to approach like that, we have to write everything systematically in HTML

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We write this line at the top of the HTML file

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: In this line, we write something like exclamation doc type HTML

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: The basic meaning of this line is that we are using HTML5

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That means it tells the whole document that which version of HTML is being used, version 5 is being used

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Like we have versions in games or we update apps like WhatsApp, similarly HTML is also updated

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And the updated version of HTML which we use is our version 5

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Which we represent through this line

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: After that, the next tag which we write is my HTML tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: HTML tag makes the whole code written inside itself

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That means all the remaining things which we are going to write, all of them will be written inside the HTML tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: HTML tag can be called as our root tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now where does this word root come from?

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Root means the first part of any code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So whenever we talk about HTML code, we have written this tag at the top which we call HTML tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Inside HTML tag, we have written this tag which we call head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So inside HTML, a hierarchical structure is formed like this

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Inside head tag, I have written this tag which we call title tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So like this, we can arrange our tags level wise

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And this arrangement is called hierarchical arrangement

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Hierarchical means in which levels are formed

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Like we have our grandfathers at our home, under them, our father's generation comes

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Under father's generation, our generation comes

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So like this, a hierarchy is formed in which levels are formed when you make a diagram

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Similarly, levels are formed inside our HTML tags which shows which tag comes above

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Which tag comes below or inside

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So in this hierarchical arrangement, the one which is at the top level, we call it as root

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And here, our HTML tag will be the root

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Because this is the first valid tag with which we start our HTML code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So whenever we are writing our HTML code, we will first write the doc type

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then we will be writing the HTML tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And then all of the code will be going inside our HTML tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now inside the HTML tag, the first tag which we write is our head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We are writing this head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And inside the head tag, all of our meta information or extra information goes

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means whatever part I have, like if I want to link CSS with HTML

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means if I want to tell the styling of any website, then that styling will be told inside the head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If I want to link JavaScript with HTML, then we will be linking that also inside the head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means the linking of other files or any extra information which we don't want to display on the browser or web page

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: But extra information should be there

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We write that information inside our head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So we can say this head tag in a way that we store our metadata inside it

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Metadata means data about data

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means whatever is our HTML code, we want to store extra information about it

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Like where to get the styling and functionality

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And inside this head tag, there is one tag which we always define for our web pages

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That is my title tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Title means that this is the title of our web page

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: You can understand the title in a way that if we want to search the name of any website on Google

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Let's say I searched on Google, Amazon.com

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So what will Google do?

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Google will search the search query on the basis of this title

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That's why the title name should be very relevant

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means whatever you want to display on your page, you have to give that name to your title

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And the title name is never displayed on the website

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means if you wrote my first page, then this title will not be displayed on your main web page

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: It is displayed on the top of the website, on the tab

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Let's see an example of this

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Let's say we opened the website netflix.com

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now when the website will open like this on netflix.com

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then it is written on the top that there is an icon of Netflix

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Netflix India, watch TV shows online, watch movies online

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So this is the title of my main web page on Netflix

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So this way the title shows us what is going to happen on the web page

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That's why the title name should be kept for our projects or websites

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Next thing we will talk about is my body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now if we want, we can divide html into two parts

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: One is our head tag and the other is our body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: All the things that come under the head tag that are not generally visible on the website

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And in these things, our metadata is stored

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Let's make it a metadata

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And those things are visible on our body tag that are actually displayed on our web page

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Like if I want to write a paragraph tag, then it will come under the body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If I want to write a heading tag, then it will also come under the body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Or if there is any other tag, like we will learn to make many tags

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We will learn to make lists, forms, tables, buttons, images, etc.

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So all those tags are written under my body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So like we have written this paragraph tag under the body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So this is a general layout that we always follow whenever we want to write our html code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now what we do is, we are going to generate this html boilerplate code in our VS code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So we have made an empty file, classroom.html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And there is a shortcut on our VS code to generate this boilerplate code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So what we can do is, we can simply press the exclamation mark

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you type this exclamation mark on the keyboard, then you will see some options

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: These are called emits

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Emits means that this is a short form

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you have written an exclamation mark in the html file in VS code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then it means that you are telling VS code that whether you want to generate boilerplate code or not

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And in fact, html will show you that emits abbreviation

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That you are trying to generate some code of this type

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And now you can simply click on this blue line

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Or you can press enter or return on your mac

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Or you can press any of the option on your mac

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Or the easiest option is to click on this blue line

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So what happens by clicking, my boilerplate code, html, VS code automatically generated

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And how did it generate? It was generated with the help of emits

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: What are emits? Emits are short forms

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: In VS code, there are pre-installed emits or if you are using some other code editor

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then there are pre-installed emits on many code editors

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If emits are not working on your VS code or you are using some other code editor

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And it is not working on it, then there is no problem

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: You can type this whole code by yourself

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So there is no need to worry, even if emits are not working, you can still run the code of html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now emits automatically generated all this code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: How? I wrote an exclamation mark in a short form, and my whole code was generated

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So emits are very useful for us and we will go ahead and learn more about emits

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: For now, let's focus on our boilerplate code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: The first line tells me that I am using html5

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: In the second line, I see something like this in html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Language lang is equal to en

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: The basic meaning of this line is that the extra line in the html tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: It basically means that which language we want to show on our page

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We want to use the English language

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now there are multiple languages that you can use in html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you want, you can use French, German

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: But primarily we use English

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then there is my head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: You can see 2-3 extra tags in it that give me meta information

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Meta information means the information that is about the data

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Such information that is not visible but is stored extra

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So here is some information of the same type

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Here it is told to me which character set we are using

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Character set means the name of the English character set is written here

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And there is more extra information about screen sizes

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Which is basically my viewport

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: But these are extra things, so there is no need to pay much attention to it

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: This is my title

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: After that, my head tag ends and then my body tag comes

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So in this way, we can do the basic layout of our html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And in the body tag, we can write a paragraph tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Let's call it

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Hello world

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We have written hello world in the paragraph tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And we are going to write in the title

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: My boilerplate code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Save

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now if we refresh it in the browser

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then some things like this will appear

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Means the hello world that I had written in the paragraph tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: I can see it on my screen, that is, on the window, on the website

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And my boilerplate code is the line that I had written in the title

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: I can see it on the top of the browser, on the tab

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So this difference is in the title and body tag content

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Now whenever we write our html code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We can leave it in this similar layout

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: But there are some things that we can do

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Which makes our code more readable

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Like one thing we can do

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: As soon as there is another tag inside the html tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Or there is another tag inside any tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So we will give it a tab space

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That is, I will go here and give it a little space

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That is, I pressed tab on my keyboard

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And I will also give these four a little tab space

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: I gave it a tab space

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And what will happen in this way

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: The layout will look very beautiful

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Let's save it

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So I am getting to know that if there is space here

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then my head tag comes inside my html tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If there is space between meta and head

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then my meta tag is coming inside my head tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And in the same way

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If there is space in the paragraph and body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then the paragraph tag is coming inside the body tag

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So the extra space that we give to the front

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: This is called indentation

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: I will tell you by writing

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: It is a very interesting word

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: This is called indentation

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Indentation

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: The basic meaning of indentation is proper spacing

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And indentation

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Is a sign of a good programmer

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: A professional programmer

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: That he gives space in his code in a good way

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And the code becomes very readable

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So as I give spacing

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: In the coming chapters

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: We have to follow it in a way

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And in the same way our good habit will build

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: And in fact indentation is not only in html code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Whether we read javascript

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Whether we read css

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: It is important in all

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you have not given indentation in html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then it will not make any difference to html

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Our code will run as it is

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: But a language like python

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: If you have given indentation in it

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Then your code does not work

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So indentation is very important there

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: Here

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: It is not at all important to run the code

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: But yes

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: It is a sign of an experienced and professional programmer

chunks.title: Boilerplate Code
chunks.text: So we have to follow it
